UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, N.R. AS TO DEFENDANT CLARK, RAWENA DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
